game_info.title: The Kid's Journey
game_info.concept:
*NOTICE* Play the beginning for free. A one-time in-app purchase unlocks the full game.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/bastion/id1467063160

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

*NOTICE* Play the beginning for free. A one-time in-app purchase unlocks the full game.

* * *

AWARDS
 
- App Store BEST of 2012 Pick
- App Store EDITORS' CHOICE

The original version of Bastion earned more than 100 industry accolades, including:
- BEST DOWNLOADABLE GAME and BEST DEBUT, Game Developers Choice Awards
- DOWNLOADABLE TITLE of the YEAR, Academy of Interactive Arts and Sciences
- BEST VIDEOGAME of the YEAR, Paste Magazine
- BEST DOWNLOADABLE GAME and BEST ORIGINAL SCORE, SpikeTV
- BEST DOWNLOADABLE GAME and BEST INDIE GAME, Inside Gaming Awards
 
* * *
 
Bastion for iOS features all the highly acclaimed artwork, music, and narration that Bastion is known for, along with intuitive touch controls. Explore more than 40 lush hand-painted environments as you discover the secrets of the Calamity, a surreal catastrophe that shattered the world to pieces. Wield a huge arsenal of upgradeable weapons and battle savage beasts adapted to their new habitat. Finish the main story to unlock New Game Plus mode and continue your journey!
 
KEY FEATURES
- Stunning hand-painted artwork
- Critically-acclaimed original music score
- Hours of reactive narration deliver a deep story
- Intuitive touch controls created exclusively for iOS
- Universal App optimized for iPhone and iPad
- Variable difficulty for players of all skill levels
- Action-packed combat rewards playing with finesse
- 10+ unique upgradeable weapons to be used
- 6 powerful Bastion structures to be discovered
- 'New Game Plus' mode unlocked after finishing the story
- Game Center achievements and leaderboards 
- Sync saved data seamlessly via iCloud

Bastion is the first title from Supergiant Games. We're a small developer with big ambitions: to make games that spark your imagination like the games you played as a kid. Follow @SupergiantGames on Twitter or visit us at www.supergiantgames.com.

* * *

LANGUAGES
- Voice-over narration: English
- Text and subtitles: English, Simplified Chinese, German, French, Spanish, Italian (based on region setting)
game_info.description: Welcome to "The Kid's Journey". In the wake of the Calamity, the world has shattered into floating islands. You play as the Kid, seeking to restore the Bastion. The ground forms beneath your feet as you explore. Fight off the Scumbags and Windbags using your trusty Hammer and Breaker Bow. Reach the Core at the end of the path to restore the world. Watch your step—don't fall off the edge!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move the Kid around the floating world.
- Z: Attack with the Cael Hammer (Melee).
- Space: Fire the Breaker Bow (Ranged).
- Shift: Evasive Roll (Dodge attacks and move faster).
- ESC: Pause/Unpause the game.
- R: Restart the game (from Game Over screen).
- ENTER: Start the game.

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic input responsiveness and random interaction.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will send random movement inputs and occasional attack commands (Z or Space) to ensure the player character reacts, animations play, and no crashes occur during combat actions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game runs for at least 30 seconds without errors. The player moves, attacks, and potentially takes damage or defeats an enemy.

TEST_2.test_description: Test winning the game by reaching the Core.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The test controller uses pathfinding to navigate the predefined tile map directly towards the Core (End Goal), ignoring enemies unless blocked, using the Roll ability to move efficiently.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player successfully navigates the forming path, reaches the end coordinate, and triggers the "GAME_OVER_WIN" state.
